name: json-tree
description: Recursively collapsible JSON tree viewer with type-coloured primitives and circular reference detection.

props.name: data
props.description: The data to render. Accepts any JavaScript value — object, array, string, number, boolean, null, or undefined.

props.name: defaultDepth
props.description: Number of depth levels expanded on first render. Nodes deeper than this start collapsed. Pass Infinity to expand all levels.

props.name: title
props.description: Optional title shown in the header bar above the tree.
